name: Black Hole
lore: A region where gravity is so extreme that nothing — not even light — can escape. At the center lies a singularity: a point where the laws of physics simply stop working.

name: Void
lore: Even 'nothing' isn't truly empty. Quantum mechanics predicts the vacuum constantly seethes with virtual particles popping in and out of existence.

name: Tsar Bomba
lore: The most powerful nuclear weapon ever detonated — 50 megatons. Its shockwave circled the Earth three times. The flash was visible from 1,000 km away.

name: Sharknado
lore: A 2013 SyFy film so bad it became legendary. Spawned five sequels. Meteorologically, a tornado carrying live sharks remains impossible. Probably.

name: Philosopher
lore: „Gott ist tot. Gott bleibt tot. Und wir haben ihn getötet."

name: Charizard
lore: Despite looking exactly like a dragon, Charizard was infamously NOT a Dragon-type in Gen I. Game Freak fixed this 20 years later with Mega Charizard X.

name: Ocean World
lore: A planet entirely covered in water. Europa and Enceladus — moons in our own solar system — likely have vast liquid oceans beneath their icy crusts, making them top candidates for extraterrestrial life.

name: Starboy
lore: I was supposed to be a lot of things.
